---
title: "FourAITricksterPlayAnalysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
```

```{r,message=False}
experimentNames <- c("One")
hours <- 1:90

dflst = list()
for(h in hours){
  for(exp in experimentNames){
    fname = str_glue("../FourAITricksterPlay{h}Hr{exp}.csv")
    if(file.exists(fname)){
      df = read_csv(fname)
      # df <- df %>% mutate(dealer = case_when(dealer == 0 ~ 3,
      #                                        dealer != 0 ~ dealer-1))
      # df<-df %>% mutate(rankCategory = case_when(rankCategory == "mediumHigh" ~ "mediumhigh",
      #                                        rankCategory != "mediumHigh" ~ rankCategory))
      dflst[[length(dflst) + 1]] <- df
    }
  }
}
df <- bind_rows(dflst)
```


```{r}
df %>% 
  count(winner)
```

```{r}
df %>% 
  summarize(totalScore0 = sum(score0),
            totalScore1 = sum(score1),
            totalScore2 = sum(score2),
            totalScore3 = sum(score3)) %>% 
  mutate(avgScore0 = totalScore0/nrow(df),
            avgScore1 = totalScore1/nrow(df),
            avgScore2 = totalScore2/nrow(df),
            avgScore3 = totalScore3/nrow(df))
```


```{r}
write_csv(df,"../FourAITricksterPlayCombined.csv")
```
